homeHowItWorks.title: A simple flow that feels premium
homeHowItWorks.description: Conversion-focused UX, clear structure and modern SaaS polish — end to end.
homeHowItWorks.step1Desc: Filter by destination, dates and guests to find the right stay fast.
homeHowItWorks.step2Desc: Secure payment, clear policies, instant confirmation.
homeHowItWorks.step3Desc: Travelers enjoy the stay — hosts get a premium dashboard and tools.

homeFeatures.title: Everything you need to book — and to host — beautifully
homeFeatures.description: A premium experience inspired by the best travel marketplaces and modern SaaS design.
homeFeatures.easyBookingDesc: A frictionless flow: search, compare, book — done.
homeFeatures.verifiedDesc: Quality checks and review integrity so you can book with confidence.
homeFeatures.paymentsDesc: Safe, compliant payments designed for international travel.
homeFeatures.availabilityDesc: Handpicked stays across key destinations — easy to explore.
homeFeatures.dashboardDesc: Manage listings, pricing and availability with clarity.
homeFeatures.supportDesc: Fast, human support for travelers and hosts — anytime.

homeBecomeHost.title: Turn your place into a high-performing listing
homeBecomeHost.description: GuestConnect gives hosts a modern dashboard, secure payouts and visibility to travelers looking for curated stays.
homeBecomeHost.pricingDesc: Nightly rates, seasonal rules and minimum stays.
homeBecomeHost.occupancyDesc: Performance and conversion at a glance.
homeBecomeHost.messagingDesc: Communicate with guests from one clean inbox.

homeTestimonials.title: Loved by travelers. Trusted by hosts.
homeTestimonials.description: A premium experience is built on trust signals and real feedback.

homeSocialProof.tagline: The reliability travelers expect — and the tools hosts need.

searchPage.title: Search stays
searchPage.description: Use the search bar to refine your stay.
searchPage.emptyDescription: Try another destination or remove a few capacity, budget, or amenity filters.

listingPage.aboutBody: A premium stay selected for its hospitality and clarity. Here you’ll find the essentials: accurate photos, amenities, approximate location, and verified reviews. Policies and payments are shown upfront so you can book with confidence. This page is an Airbnb-like base — connect it to your backend later (photos, availability, policies, etc.).
listingPage.footerNote: Secure payment · Instant confirmation · No hidden fees
listingPage.mapSubtitle: Approximate location — exact address shown after booking

host.yearsBadge: {count, plural, =1 {1 year on GuestConnect} other {# years on GuestConnect}}

one.name: Amina K.
one.body: Beautiful place, very clean and calm. Check-in was smooth and the host was responsive.

two.name: Jean M.
two.body: Great value for money. The location is convenient and the rooms are well maintained.

three.name: Sophia L.
three.body: Exactly as described. Comfortable bedding and a premium feel overall.

reviewsBlock.title: Traveler reviews
reviewsBlock.showMoreReviews: Show {count, plural, =1 {1 more review} other {# more reviews}}
reviewsBlock.emptyDescription: Be the first to share your experience after your stay.

bookingCard.note: Secure payment · Instant confirmation · No hidden fees

reviewForm.title: Leave a review
reviewForm.subtitle: Your feedback helps other travelers book with confidence.
reviewForm.placeholder: Share your experience (cleanliness, location, host, etc.)
reviewForm.success: Thanks! Your review was saved locally.

calendarTools.title: Clear dates, fast booking
calendarTools.description: A calendar experience inspired by top travel marketplaces: simple, readable and mobile-first.
calendarTools.bullet1: Pick dates across two months with zero friction.
calendarTools.bullet2: “Flexible dates” mode to help users find better prices.
calendarTools.bullet3: White, premium UI with soft elevation.
calendarTools.flexSubtitle: Choose a trip type and we’ll suggest the best period.
calendarTools.flexResultBody: We’ll show recommended periods here (mid-week, off-peak, etc.).

destinationsPage.title: Where are you going?
destinationsPage.description: Browse popular cities and start your search in one click.

experiencesPage.title: Moments to live (not just a stay)
experiencesPage.description: Premium activities, local guides and unique experiences — Airbnb-inspired with a modern SaaS finish.
experiencesPage.promoBody: Each activity is designed to be easy to buy, clear to understand and premium to enjoy. A modern, smooth, conversion-first UX — even on mobile.

hostPage.title: List your place on GuestConnect
hostPage.description: Attract travelers, stay in control, and manage bookings with a premium experience.

steps.oneDesc: Add photos, pricing, and rules in minutes.
